Color.description: CSS color value in hex, RGB, RGBA, HSL, or named color format

Dimension.signature: number + unit (px, em, rem, %, vw, vh)
Dimension.description: Numeric value with a CSS unit for lengths, sizes, and measurements

String.description: Quoted text string used in content properties and function arguments

Number.description: Unitless numeric literal used in calculations and opacity values

Variable.description: LESS variable declared with @ prefix, holds reusable values for the stylesheet

Mixin.description: Reusable block of CSS declarations that can accept parameters and be included in rules

Ruleset.description: CSS rule block containing declarations applied to elements matching the selector

Boolean.description: Boolean value used in LESS guard expressions for conditional mixin evaluation
